Apple Woods.Name: Apple Woods
Apple Woods.BossTxt: You hear a loud howl echo through the woods.
Apple Woods.ExitTxt: Through an opening amidst the trees, you spot the walls of Bertunia Castle Town.

Caves of Light.Name: Caves of Light
Caves of Light.ExitTxt:
After endless venturing through the mazelike caves, 
you finally arrive at the exit, emerging onto the Sundown Plateau.

Sundown Plateau.Name: Sundown Plateau
Sundown Plateau.ExitTxt: After a long treck through the plateau, you arrive at the foothills of Mt. Legory.

Mt. Legory.Name: Mt. Legory
Mt. Legory.ExitTxt: You find an entrance on the cliffside and delve into it until you discover the Core Cavern.

Core Cavern.Name: Core Cavern
Core Cavern.ExitTxt:
At the exit of the Cavern you find yourself at the Lost Swamp,
 But first, you head Mugell Town, a small town elevated on ricketty wood platforms above the murky swamp water.

Lost Swamp.Name: Lost Swamp
Lost Swamp.ExitTxt:
Treading through the accursed swamp, you find your final destination,
 the Arcmat Ruins, said to be the birthplace of all magic.

Arcmat Ruins.Name: Arcmat Ruins
Arcmat Ruins.ExitTxt:
After finishing your epic quest,
 you decide to chill and kill monsters and let off some steam at the ARENA!!!
